subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the hem of glory! Blessed is the soul that hath inhaled the fragrance of faithfulness from the garden of grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بذیل الکبریاء طوبی لنفس استنشق رائحه الوفاء من حدیقه الکبریاء و
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
